basic_details.job_title: Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 40 Para Pump Operator, Multipurpose Worker and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter, Multipurpose Worker

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Matriculation (10th Pass) with ITI in relevant trades, Middle Pass (8th Standard)
qualification.details: Para Pump Operator: Matriculation (10th Pass) along with ITI Certificate in Electrician, Wireman, Diesel Mechanic, Pump Mechanic, Motor Mechanic, Pump Operator-cum-Mechanic, Mechanic (Motor Vehicle) or certificate under Government Skill Development Scheme. Para Fitter: Matriculation (10th Pass) along with ITI Certificate in Fitter or Plumber or certificate under Government Skill Development Scheme. Multi Purpose Worker: Middle Pass (8th Standard) or equivalent from a school recognized by the State Government.

salary_details.details: Para Pump Operator: Rs. 7100/- Per Month Para Fitter: Rs. 7100/- Per Month Multi Purpose Worker: Rs. 6000/- Per Month

selection_process: Document Verification Merit List based on documents Skill Test/Physical Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.jsv.hp.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag recruitment is 27th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 40 vacancies released by the Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag for the posts of Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter, and Multipurpose Worker.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 45 years for all the posts.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: For Para Pump Operator and Para Fitter, candidates need to have Matriculation (10th Pass) with ITI in relevant trades. For Multipurpose Worker, Middle Pass (8th Standard) is required.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 6000/- to Rs. 7100/- per month, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Document Verification, Merit List based on documents, and Skill Test/Physical Test.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The jobs are located in Chowari, Himachal Pradesh, with a pincode of 176302.
